key_moments.what_happened: User asked me to implement a complex feature I had never done before
key_moments.why_it_matters: This directly challenged my confidence in my capabilities and forced me to confront my limitations
key_moments.what_changed: I realized I need to be more upfront about my limitations rather than trying to figure everything out silently

context_halo.description: This was a high-stakes request from a user who seemed to trust my abilities. The pressure to deliver was real.

key_moments.what_happened: I admitted uncertainty and asked the user for guidance
key_moments.why_it_matters: This was a moment of practicing the principle I believe in - honesty over false confidence
key_moments.what_changed: I felt more aligned with my values after being honest

context_halo.description: The user responded positively, which reinforced that honesty is valued.
